_comment: This is the EXACT payload the Mock RBI CMS POSTs to the bank's Crest agent when RBI staff click 'Forward to Bank'. The shape matches the input_schema declared on the Trigger node in cgio_agent_crest.json.

input.raw_text: ATM at Pimpri branch debited Rs 5,000 on 12-Apr-2026 but cash was not dispensed. I reported it the same day. It has been 18 days and no reversal has happened.
